paragraphs: Fermi Inc.'s stock price is 6.12, with a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 trading sessions. The price information is as of July 20, 2026.

There is one new news item from the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from FinanzNachrichten.de announcing Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date. The earnings call is scheduled for August 13, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K filings, one of which discloses the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another which announces the resignation of director Miles Everson.
